description: UEFN Toolbelt Community Plugin Registry — one-click install from the Plugin Hub tab.

plugins.name: Wave Spawner
plugins.author: OceanBennett
plugins.description: Automatically spawns and manages timed enemy waves using Verse device groups. Integrates with the Toolbelt device graph.

plugins.name: Day/Night Cycle Manager
plugins.author: OceanBennett
plugins.description: Drives sky light, directional light, and fog settings through a configurable day-night cycle. Supports custom time-of-day presets.

plugins.name: Prop Randomizer Plus
plugins.author: OceanBennett
plugins.description: Extended scatter and randomization toolkit. Supports asset pools, weighted probability, and terrain-conforming placement.
